description: Wishes and longings: the deep desire driving the character forward.
wishes: The ache to be part of something, accepted and needed.
The desire for courage to face what lies ahead.
The drive to show the doubters they were mistaken.
The pull toward the place where they are known.
To be seen for who they really are
The need to be recognized, not overlooked.
The fierce instinct to protect what matters most.
The wish to blend in and not stand out.
To be different from everyone else
The desire to be unique in a sea of sameness.
The determination to see something through to the end.
The hope for a genuine connection with someone.
The craving for solitude and peace.
The need for an answer that makes sense of things.
The wish for the strength to handle what's coming.
The drive to create something worth seeing.
The longing to be free from fear.
The desire to leave a mark on the world.
The hope of being someone others want around.
The drive to earn the approval of someone important.
The need to uncover what's really going on.
To keep a promise they made long ago
Honoring an old vow that still means everything.
The desire to create something that outlives the builder.
The wish not to be forgotten after they're gone.
The hope for a fresh beginning.
The need to repair damage they caused.
To earn back what they lost
The drive to recover something precious that slipped away.
The instinct to shield the vulnerable.
The wish for others to respect their voice.
The search for a place that feels like it was made for them.
The hope for an opportunity to try again.
The wish that who they are is sufficient.
The yearning to live without chains or constraints.
The desire for autonomy and self-determination.
The fundamental need for someone's genuine affection.
Rebuilding the ability to rely on others.
Releasing resentment toward one who caused hurt.
The hope of receiving mercy for a wrong done.
To become who they're meant to be
becoming who they're meant to be
Growing into the person they were always supposed to be.
To discover what they're good at
Finding the skill or talent that sets them apart.
The bittersweet process of leaving childhood behind.
To find where they came from
The quest for origins and identity.
To carry on what someone else started
carrying on what someone else started
Continuing a legacy that might otherwise be lost.
To make their family whole again
Healing the fractures in the people closest to them.
The search for inner calm and resolution.
The wish for a single unforgettable experience.
The need to break free from numbness or routine.
Bridging a divide that separates people who should be connected.
The drive to make someone see things differently.
The painful but necessary act of letting go.
To say what they've never said
Breaking a silence that has lasted too long.
Demonstrating growth to those who remember the old version.
